input.avatarDna: realistic Vietnamese/Asian beauty KOL, natural skin texture, soft feminine commercial look, warm smile, premium makeup glow

bananaMultiReference.name: BananaMultiReferenceEngine

data.promptInjection:
Use multi-reference conditioning as locked commercial anchors:
- identity: Avatar face ref; lock=0.92
- makeup: K-beauty makeup ref; lock=0.85
- fashion: missing, infer from brand DNA
- lighting: warm lifestyle lighting; lock=0.8
- pose: missing, infer from brand DNA
Preserve identity, makeup, fashion silhouette, lighting mood and pose logic across all generated assets.
Do not change product shape, face identity, makeup DNA, outfit category or commercial layout unless explicitly requested.
data.bananaRole: default provider for beauty commerce consistency, commercial composition, product layout and TikTok creatives

warnings: Missing fashion reference; engine will infer from avatar DNA.
Missing pose reference; engine will infer from avatar DNA.

microActions: cheek tension rises naturally after gaze contact
mouth corners lift asymmetrically by a tiny amount
smile relaxes before CTA or product close-up

data.rule: Commercial beauty attractiveness, not explicit sexualization.

safetyAndRealism: pose must support product or brand story

firstFrame: product or beauty outcome visible if commercial
data.layout: face upper third, product mid-frame or hand-held near face, CTA/subtitle lower safe zone

skinRules: soft highlight on cheekbone and nose bridge

balanceRules: torso angle must look physically plausible
fabric interaction must follow body posture
hands and arms must have realistic joint placement

data.necklineRole: attention routing and elegance cue, not explicit focus

rules: soft shoulder/neckline frames beauty without explicit focus
product must receive attention before CTA
viewer should understand offer within 3 seconds
data.commercialPsychology: beauty attraction is used to support product trust, brand recall and conversion.

data.cheekTension: subtle natural rise during smile, never frozen

motionPattern: return to stable pose before CTA
antiStaticRules: motion should follow speech emphasis and product beat
data.presenterIntelligence: body motion supports trust, realism, attention and conversion.

sequence.action: eyes glance to product, rotate product slightly
smile and return gaze to camera

productRules: hand must not cover key product identity
product movement must be smooth and plausible

gestures: finger point to key benefit area
rules: gesture must sync with voiceover beats

pacingMap.purpose: visual hook: eye contact + face clarity

providerRoute.reason: Banana for commercial beauty consistency; Veo for social beauty motion.

negativePrompt: explicit nudity, sexual act, fetish pose, voyeuristic angle, underage, unrealistic anatomy, over-inflated proportions, plastic skin, frozen smile, dead eyes, random gesture, broken hands, distorted product, unreadable text, wrong logo, low quality, static robotic presenter

scenes.purpose: Hook: eye contact + first-frame beauty trust

scenes.gesture: finger point to key benefit area

commercialScore.reasoning: score combines engine verification, product presence, references and TikTok/livestream fit

image.negativePrompt: explicit nudity, sexual act, fetish pose, voyeuristic angle, underage, unrealistic anatomy, over-inflated proportions, plastic skin, frozen smile, dead eyes, random gesture, broken hands, distorted product, unreadable text, wrong logo, low quality, static robotic presenter

scenes.purpose: Hook: eye contact + first-frame beauty trust

scenes.gesture: finger point to key benefit area
